name: AnimeMan: The 13th Princess's Overpowered Servant
author: nayem58
genres: Reincarnation, Comedy, Male Lead, Strong Lead, Action, Adventure, Magic, Romance Subplot
summary:
In a world where magic is industrialized and technology is fueled by mana, the most brutal competition of the century has begun: The Succession War. Twenty-one Princes and Princesses are locked in a struggle for the throne. To win, each royal must assemble a team of nine "Servants"—an elite force of guards, assassins, and tacticians who will fight their battles in a series of lethal missions and high-stakes games.

Eighteen years ago, a soul from Earth was reincarnated into this world as a commoner. In this realm, "Anime" does not exist. While other mages spent their lives studying orthodox spells and mana formulas, he spent his youth secretly modifying his magic to recreate the logic-defying powers of his favorite anime heroes. From "Domain Expansions- alike" to "Bankai-alike" to “Power beam” and "Super-Speed Flight," his abilities are completely alien to the mages of this world. To him, it was just a hobby; to everyone else, it was a power that threatened the very balance of reality.

The 13th Princess, an underdog with no allies and a target on her back, is, however, a strong-willed woman who happens to witness a simple commoner helping a struggling old man. Impressed by his heart and sensing a strange, unreadable aura, she recruits him as her Ninth Servant.

As the Succession War turns into a bloodbath, the other 20 Royals unleash legendary creatures and world-class knights. But they soon encounter an anomaly they cannot name. A commoner who moves faster than sound, summons giant energy avatars, and ignores the laws of magic entirely.

The game for the throne has changed forever, and it’s time for the AnimeMan to show the world a power it has never seen before.

Planet name: Lumina

Empire Name: The Belmontia Empire

Imperial Family: Belmontia

Main Lead: Ken Eliot

13th Princess: Iris Belmonte

Genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, OP Main Lead, Magic, Super Hero, Harem, Reincarnation, Beautiful Female Lead
